prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford 109E inline-4 (997cc) with a Cosworth MAE (Modified Anglia Engine) Stage 2 camshaft, forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), and a Weber 45DCOE carburetor setup with 36mm venturis for optimized airflow at high RPM (8,000+ redline).

Custom-built 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering, paired with a bespoke 2.5-inch diameter straight-pipe exhaust system featuring a Scuderia Toppino muffler for weight reduction and aggressive acoustics.

Chassis reinforcement via a T45 steel tubular spaceframe by Gillet Racing, with integrated roll cage and front/rear anti-roll bars from H&R (22mm front, 18mm rear) for improved rigidity and cornering stability.
estetica: Full bodywork restoration using lightweight 1.2mm aluminum panels by Fibreline Composites, replicating the 1956 Le Mans-spec aerodynamic profile with a revised front splitter and rear diffuser for downforce optimization.
Custom-fabricated Perspex windscreen with aero-grade polycarbonate side windows by Sabelt, reducing weight by 40% while maintaining vintage aesthetics.
Period-correct 15-inch magnesium knock-off wheels by Borrani (5.5J front, 6J rear) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ vintage racing tires (5.00-15 front, 5.50-15 rear) for authentic grip and visual accuracy.
